zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton於1487年1月出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾劍橋大學默里 阿爾度爾時，他的父親Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II27歲，母親Lady Janet Crichton26歲。他於1507年12月10日與Lady Catherine Stewart在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年12月22日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton于1487年1月出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾劍橋大學默里 阿爾度爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II27岁，母亲Lady Janet Crichton26岁。他于1507年12月10日与Lady Catherine Stewart在英国苏格兰度福利爾莫頓结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年12月22日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton was born in January 1487, in New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II, was 27 and his mother, Lady Janet Crichton, was 26. He married Lady Catherine Stewart on 10 December 1507, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 22 December 1548, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton est né en janvier 1487, à New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Crichton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Stewart le 10 décembre 1507, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1548, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton im Januar 1487 in New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II 27 und seine Mutter Lady Janet Crichton 26. Er hat am 10. Dezember 1507 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Catherine Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1548 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton è nato il nel gennaio 1487 nel New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Janet Crichton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Stewart il 10 dicembre 1507, nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1548, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Mortonが1487年1月にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアニュー アバードウルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar IIは27歳，母Lady Janet Crichtonは26歳であった。1507年12月10日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンでLady Catherine Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年12月22日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで61歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton(이)가 1487년 1월 스컷랜드 압르디실르 뉴 압르다어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Janet Crichton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1507년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 Lady Catherine Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 12월 22일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton nasceu em janeiro de 1487, em New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Crichton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Stewart em 10 de dezembro de 1507, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1548, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton родился январь 1487 г. в местности ню абирдоур, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Crichton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Stewart 10 декабря 1507 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 22 декабря 1548 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton nació en enero de 1487, en New Aberdour, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Gordon, Lord of Lochinvar II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Janet Crichton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Stewart el 10 de diciembre de 1507, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1548, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
